title: autobench.budget.warning v1
description: Budget guard threshold-crossing events. Emitted at 50%, 80%, 100% of either the cost or wall-time budget. Source: /autobench.

fraction_used.description: Larger of (current_cost / max_cost) and (elapsed_wall / max_wall). Range [0, +inf).

current_cost_usd.description: Cumulative cost in USD across all improver calls accounted to this session.

elapsed_wall_seconds.description: Elapsed wall-clock seconds since the guard was created.

threshold.description: Which threshold tripped this warning (0.5, 0.8, or 1.0).

action.description: What the guard did. 'warning' for 50/80% notifications; 'halt' for 100%+ (also when on_exceed is 'halt').

reason.description: Human-readable explanation, e.g. 'cost 1.02 USD exceeds cap 1.00 USD'.
